## Changelog

### Beta 1.3.5 (in progress)

General

* Pistoleer type abilities no longer grant ASSAULT. (Seraphim, Inceptor, Inquisitor, Vanus Infocyte, Starstorm, pirate Specialty, Grot Gunslinger, Hired Gun)

Battlekit

* Hand Flamers cost 25 instead of 20  
* Weapons with Frag and Krak options no longer have Krak option  
* Cyclone Missile Launcher and Missile Launcher have BLAST 2” instead of 3”  
* Twin Heavy Stubber has 36” range, has HEAVY as intended  
* Armour with HEAVY applies the penalty for HEAVY ranged attacks

Campaign

* Champion skill does not apply to weapons that can be used in addition to normal attacks.  
* Heavy Melee Training gives \+1 INJURY DICE in melee if already STRONG  
* Careful Exploration Skill still grant money  
* Trader skill gives 2D6x10 credits  
* Added Delete Exploration Skill  
* Set Dice returns to being used after the roll  
* Lookout skill replaced with Escapist  
* ANATHEMA models cannot have Psychic Awakening  
* Models that can’t carry melee weapons do not need a PSYCHIC weapon to use powers from Psychic Awakening

Missions

* Escort Supplies updated to two transports that move in opposite directions, among other tweaks.

Shared Patrons

* Khorne’s Brazen Hide gives IMPERVIOUS to \-1 armour, instead of extra armour

Mercenaries

* Grot Gunslinger Kustom Grot Blastas have ASSAULT  
* Daemon Mercs’ Daemonic Resistance gives IMPERVIOUS armour; Daemons with Armour instead have IMPERVIOUS for some of it  
* Flash Git’s Ammo Run updated to latest version  
* Black Legionnaire is unavailable to Chaos Daemons (Shadow Legion)  
* God-specific Daemon Princes require that god as patron  
* Daemon Prince has a Warp Bolter  
* Daemon Mercenaries updated to their new stats; Cost changes:   
  * Summoned Flesh Count from 3 to 4  
  * Summoned Screamer from 2 to 3  
  * Summoned Seeker from 4 to 3  
  * Summoned Pink Horror from 5 to 4

Adepta Sororitas

* Brazier of Holy Fire’s Unleash has 8” range instead of 12” and \-1 INJURY DICE  
* Twin Storm Bolter has ASSAULT

Adeptus Astartes

* Chaplain’s Crozius Arcanum has ICON instead of LEADER

Adeptus Custodes

* Shield-Captain has Living Fortress instead of TOUGH  
* Praesidium Shield improves IMPERVIOUS to first \-2, costs 40  
* Custodian Warden upgrade costs 15 instead of 10  
* Achillus Dreadspear has TWO-HANDED as intended  
* Contemptor Dreadnought’s Unyielding Ancient gives IMPERVIOUS to \-1 armour instead of \-1 INJURY DICE  
* Aquilon Armour allows two-handed ranged in one hand  
* Aquilon Terminator has Heavy Assault Infantry, has above Aquilon Armour buff, and costs 95 plus armour

Astra Militarum

* Null Coat is Non-Psyker only

Chao Cult

* Daemonic Resistance gives IMPERVIOUS to some of Daemon Prince’s armour  
* Daemon Prince has \+3/+3, ELITE, FEAR, Cannon loses BLAST, and costs 220  
* An ELITE with Spawnhood remains ELITE  
* If Dark Apotheosis promotes a model to elite, it does not count towards Gifts limit and can be gained again  
* Dark Apotheosis specifies XP is retained  
* Removed “including cost” from Gift text  
* Added Flail to Armoury

Chaos Daemons General

* Ascendancy bonuses every 4th game cannot be given to UNDIVIDED  
* Daemonic Resistance gives IMPERVIOUS armour; Daemons with Armour instead have IMPERVIOUS for some of it  
* Followers of Vashtor loses Haywire, can take some Heretic Astartes and Dark Mechanicum models, can buy any amount of Unbreakable Hide and 2 Frag Grenades, but have no extra bonus against ranged  
* Followers of Vashtor cannot take any Bloodcrushers, Fiends, Plague Toads, or Screamers  
* Legions have more limited access to models from other legions, but can take their leader models (losing LEADER and TOUGH)  
* Added Shadow Legion variant  
* The Great Game does not provide reroll or bonus/penalty DICE during battles besides Morale  
* Disgustingly Resilient grants \-1 INJURY DICE instead of negating Down, ignored by Bloodbath  
* No models can equip armour, and armour items are equipment now  
* Followers of Khorne, Nurgle, Slaanesh, and Tzeentch can take Guardsmen and Veteran Guardsmen, and non-Khorne can have Possessed

Chaos Daemons Models

* Daemon Prince has \+3/+3, FEAR, Malefic Talons, doesn’t come with ranged weapon, costs 200, and can upgrade to be a Psyker  
* Daemon Prince of Khorne has CLEAVE 2 in melee instead of \+1 INJURY MODIFIER  
* Daemon Prince of Tzeentch has AUTOMATIC 2 at range instead of \+1 INJURY MODIFIER  
* Chaos Furies have 8” movement, \+0 Melee, cannot take anything from legions, Minor Daemonic Resistance, cost 75  
* Chaos Brute has \-2 Armour, LIMITED POTENTIAL, costs 110  
*   
* Bloodmaster costs 95  
* Skullmaster has \-2 armour, Devastating Charge and Skullmaster’s Fury, FEAR, STRONG, and costs 145  
* Bloodletters have Minor Daemonic Resistance, cost 55  
* Flesh Hounds limit increased to 4, have Minor Daemonic Resistance, cost 110, and one can be upgraded to be Three-Headed  
* Added new Bloodcrusher model to Blood Legion  
*   
* Tranceweaver has LEADER, TOUGH, \+1/+2, Tranceweave Ability, Minor Daemonic Resistance, costs 95  
* Infernal Enrapturess loses LEADER, TOUGH, Euphonic Blast has ARMOUR PIERCING 2 instead of IGNORE ARMOUR, Minor Daemonic Resistance, and has \+1/+1, costs 135  
* Daemonettes have Minor Daemonic Resistance  
* Seekers have Minor Daemonic Resistance, cost 100  
* Contorted Epitome has WHIP 6” with its attacks and AUTOMATIC 2, TOUGH, \-2 Armour, Swallow Energy Ability, can equip non-HELD equipment, costs 140  
* Added new Fiend model to Legion of Excess  
*   
* Poxbringer has Minor Daemonic Resistance, costs 80  
* Spoilpox Scrivener has ELITE as intended, Distended Maw, Minor Daemonic Resistance costs 70  
* Plaguebearers have Minor Daemonic Resistance, cost 55  
* Nurgling Swarm has Minor Daemonic Resistance and Disgustingly Resilient, cost 60  
* Added new Plague Toad model to Plague Legion  
* Plague Drone Rider’s Foul Mouthparts have GAS instead of CRITICAL, costs 135  
*   
* Changecaster costs 100  
* Flamer renamed Exalted Flamer, renamed weapons, flamethrower weapon has AUTOMATIC 2, gains NEGATE FIRE, loses Bounding Leaps, total cost 175, has 75 x 42mm base  
* Blue Horror gains Minor Daemonic Resistance, costs 50  
* Pink Horrors are not considered OoA for casualties if the Split models survive, can carry one HELD item along with claws, cost 130  
* Screamers cost 100  
* Added new Flamer model to Scintillating Legion

Chaos Daemons Battlekit

* Brass Horns apply a BLOOD MARKER instead of a damage buff  
* Death’s Heads have IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, ASSAULT, but not IGNORE ARMOUR  
* Rancid Vomit has IGNORE COVER and IGNORE LONG RANGE  
* Crystal Tome effect replaced, costs 2 Glory  
* Renamed Immaterial Blade and Immaterial Hammer to Heavy Etherblade and Heavy Etherhammer  
* Added Climbing Spurs, Corrosive Breath, Daemonic Quills, Etherblade, Infernal Cannon, Paired Blades, Soul Shard, Unbreakable Hide, Warp Bolter, Warp Strider, Warpsword, and Warp Tether equipment to shared Armoury  
* Removed Shield and Flail from armoury  
* Added Axe of Khorne, Brazenmaw, Demonfire, Flesh Hook, and Wrist Chains to Blood Legion Armoury  
* Added Cloud of Flies, Disgusting Sneeze, Maggot Maws, Plague Flail, and Pox Mount to Plague Legion Armoury  
* Removed The Endless Gift from Plague Legion Armoury  
* Added Dreaming Crown, Piercing Claw, and Steed of Slaanesh to Legion of Excess Armoury  
* Added Inescapable Eye, Trinket of Flux to Scintillating Legion  
* Hellblade costs 8 instead of 7  
* Alluring Musk has ASSAULT  
* Sloppity Bilepipe costs 35  
* Added 3 Locus equipments to each legion armoury  
* Added Gellercaust Mask, Pyregut, Techno-Sorcery Integration, and Fleshmelded Weapon to Followers of Vashtor  
* Arc Claws have IGNORE OFF-HAND, cost 2  
* Hell Cannon Costs 30  
* Fused Armour costs 25, Fused Hellplate costs 25 and has LIMIT: 2, count as equipment, effects replaced  
* Scorched Skull Cannon costs 20  
* Nurgling Palanquin grants FEAR  
* Disc of Tzeentch costs 25  
* Firestorm Blade costs 45  
* Armour Of Scorn is Bloodmaster Only, counts as equipment, \-2 IMPERVIOUS Armour not stacking

Drukhari

* Khymera Daemonic Resistance gives IMPERVIOUS armour, costs 90  
* Hexrifle ignores \-DICE to Injuries  
* Added Torturer’s Tools  
* Terrorfex Wraithbone mode ignored by ignoring FEAR

Genestealer Cults

* Industry reward increases limit by 25 instead of 50  
* Focus of Adoration cannot be used on BLAST

Heretic Astartes

* Alpha Legion cannot purchase any Marks of Chaos  
* Shroud Bombs have THROWN  
* Blight Grenades cost 15 and have ASSAULT  
* Helbrute gains DAEMON

Officio Assassinorum

* Culexus Assassin has ANATHEMA

Orks

* Kustom Mega Slugga replaces RISKY with DANGEROUS  
* Shokka Pistol replaces RISKY with DANGEROUS (-1 INJURY DICE, NONLETHAL, STUN MARKERS)  
* Kustom Mega Blasta replaces RISKY with DANGEROUS  
* Shokk Attack Gun replaces RISKY with DANGEROUS (STUN MARKERS)  
* Zzap Gun replaces RISKY with DANGEROUS (NONLETHAL, STUN MARKERS)  
* Ammo Runt gives \+1 DICE to hit instead of ignoring RISKY

Necromunda Gang

* House Goliath Gene Smithing rules updated. Gangers can pick a new upgrade when they become Elite  
* House Goliath Juves have \+1 Melee, cost 5 more, and Forge-Born upgrade gives movement speed instead of NEGATE FIRE  
* House Goliath Stimmer has the same Stim Up as ‘Zerker.

Tyranids

* Synapse Range reduced to 4” normally  
* Hive Tyrand and Neurotyrant have 6” Synapse Range  
* Neuroloids have normal Synapse Range (4”)  
* Winged Upgrade for Hive Tyrant costs 20 instead of 10  
* Winged upgrade for Warriors removes Many-Limbed ability and cannot carry HEAVY ranged weapons  
* Toxinjector Harpoon has ASSAULT

### Beta 1.3.4: 5/03/2026

General

* Various typo and wording fixes  
* Non-SCATTER weapons with BLAST cannot target a point.  
* Added DANGEROUS Keyword to replace injuring self on a miss.  
* Fixed a few more wordings that should use the VICIOUS Keyword.  
* Effects that move Down models specify they can be moved despite being Down.  
* Target Activation psychic power duration wording updated to end the next time the target’s Activation ends, removing the need for special wording for the caster itself’s current Activation, or new Fireteam wording.  
* Fetch abilities do not work on LARGE models, except Macro-Grapplehawk  
* Added ICON Keyword to simplify models that are better at mission-specific stuff.

Campaign

* Exploration options that provide one-time Campaign Shop access also give a discount on Glory cost.  
* Some other Glory amounts and discounts in Exploration options updated.

Patrons

* Patron skills that grant Deny the Witch count as PSYKER 2 instead of 1\.  
* Patron skills that grant VICIOUS in melee don’t affect PISTOL weapons.  
* Patron skills that treat allies as closer treat them as 6” close instead of 3”  
* Administratum Prefectus Legal Action is a redeploy and not a move.  
* Administratum Prefectus Threat Response has 8” range, cannot use a HEAVY weapon.  
* Chaos Undivided Diabolit gives \+1 DICE instead of \+1 INJURY DICE.  
* Chaos Warlord Flames of Spite effect replaced.  
* Heretek Lord Architect Of Destruction increases BLAST by only 1”.  
* Heretek Lord Bastion also grants BLOCK.  
* Heretek Lord Daemonsmith grants IMPERVIOUS instead of \-INJURY DICE, and has 6” range.  
* Heretek Lord Siege Lord works only on \-3 armour.  
* Nurgle Heaving Mass causes a BLOOD MARKER and not a STUN MARKER, and affects each charged enemy  
* Tzeentch Aetherstride wording updated to newer Diving Charge rules  
* Tzeentch Incorporeal Form ignored also by STUN MARKERS or STUN.  
* Pirate Lord The Boot prevents all Standing  
* Abbess Sanctorum Executioner Of Heretics applies only on a Bloodbath.  
* Abbess Sanctorum Indomitable Belief also prevents falling when Downed near a cliff.  
* Chapter Master Warden of Macragge renamed Warden of The Imperum.  
* Chapter Master Adept Of The Codex has LIMIT: 1 and only works if not Down.  
* Chapter Master Master Of Strategy has LIMIT: 1\.  
* Chapter Master Soulwarden has a 3” range.  
* Chapter Master Castellan Of The Black Vault reduces cost by 2 Glory.  
* Chapter Master The Ties That Bind has LIMIT: 1  
* Chapter Master Siege Master works only on \-3 armour.  
* Chapter Master Echo Of The Ravenspire has LIMIT: 1  
* Chapter Master Shadowmaster does not affect attacks that ignore long range.  
* Chapter Master Miraculous Constitution rolls only twice  
* Captain-General Master Of Martial Strategy has LIMIT: 1  
* Captain-General Radiant Mantle affects only   
* Lord General Militant replaces Draconian Disciplinarian with new Artillerist skill  
* Lord General Militant Master Tactician has LIMIT: 1  
* Warrant of Trade Acquisitions increases credit limit by 25 instead of 50  
* Alpharius Clandestine miss on a 7 only  
* Alpharius Covert Control is a redeploy and not a move.  
* Alpharius Headhunter also ignores range reductions  
* Legacy of Curze Dirty Fighter is once per Turn  
* Legacy of Curze Night Haunter’s Curse has NONLETHAL.  
* Legacy of Curze One Piece At A Time does not require causing a BLOOD MARKER  
* Legacy of Curze One With The Shadows does not affect attacks that ignore long range.  
* Phoenix Lord Shield of Grace applies to all attacks  
* Phoenix Lord Shadow Hunter effect replaced  
* Commorragh Labyrinthine Cunning hass LIMIT: 1  
* Dark Science Crucible Of Malediction has 12” range, but LIMIT: 1  
* Dark Science Master Artisan has LIMIT: 1 instead of not stacking  
* Dark Science Master Nemesine does not give \+1 INJURY DICE and does not work with PISTOLS, but gives VICIOUS 10  
* The Four-Armed Emperor Focus of Adoration allies must be within 1”  
* The Four-Armed Emperor Shadow Stalker effect replaced  
* Cegorach, the Laughing God A Foot in the Future allows you to place anywhere within 1” of the target.  
* Cegorach, the Laughing God Player of the Light effect replaced  
* Cegorach, the Laughing God Player of the Dark applies to all melee attacks and does not require causing BLOOD  
* Ancestor Core Bequest of the Votann reworded  
* Ancestor Core Warrior Lord also applies to hit rolls  
* Ancestor Core Experienced Eye has LIMIT 1 instead of not stacking  
* Ancestor Core Grim Demeanor has range of 8”  
* Guildmaster Guild Affiliate provides 2D6x10 credits instead of 1D6x10  
* Dynasty Overlord Enduring Will turns all Downs into Minor Hits  
* Dynasty Overlord Eternal Madness also applies to hit rolls  
* Dynasty Overlord Immortal Pride applies to all injuries and not just weapons  
* The Flayer Virus Shadow of Drazak applies to all attacks  
* Gork Ded Choppy has LIMIT 1 instead of not stacking  
* Mork Dakkalad has LIMIT 1 instead of not stacking  
* Great Mage Higher State of Consciousness has LIMIT: 1  
* Farsight Leader Tactical Acumen applies only while model is in the Warband  
* Shaper Chief Predator’s Pounce auto-passes Diving Charge also  
* Shaper Chief Technological Trophy also applies credit discount  
* The Hive Mind Heightened Reflexes has a range of 6” instead of 12”  
* The Hive Mind Synaptic Lynchpin increases range by 2” instead of 3”  
* Gang Overlord Crushing Blow applies BLOOD instead of STUN  
* Gang Overlord Mighty Leap also gives \+1 DICE to Diving Charge  
* Sump Lord Down and Dirty doesn’t give attack bonus, but prevents bonuses from Down against the model  
* Sump Lord Lie Low does not affect attacks that ignore long range  
* Wealthy Noble Inspiration has 8” range

Battlekit

* Added battlekit type to campaign shop items  
* Chaos Icon renamed Chaos Sigil, to avoid confusion with HELD Icons  
* Grenade type THROWN weapons across factions gain FUMBLE.  
* Electro Grenades cost 15  
* Frag Grenades cost 15  
* Gun Bombs cost 12  
* Incendiary Grenades cost 10  
* Krak Grenades cost 15  
* Melta Bombs cost 20  
* Toxin Grenades cost 20  
* Throwing Knives cost 7  
* Throwing Axes cost 10  
* Psyk-Out Grenades have \-1 INJURY DICE, cost 20  
* Musical Instrument removed (except for Chaos Daemons and Slann), and Vox Unit now has its old effect and costs 15\.  
* Las Rifles cost 7 for all factions, instead of 5 for some.  
* Harpoon Launcher and Seismic Cannon move even Down models.  
* Heavy Rock Drill and Heavy Rock Saw cost 20 credits instead of 40, or 2 Glory for Necromunda Gang Shared Armory.  
* Mole Launcher has 18” range instead of 36”, but costs 40 instead of 50  
* Troop Flag has been removed  
* Added Imperial Icon  
* Cult Icon effect replaced

Mercenaries

* Hired Gun Grenadier has \-1 DICE to hit beyond normal range.  
* Chapter Marine models do not benefit from Warband or Warband Variant rules besides Gene Seed.  
* Deathwatch Veteran moved out of Chapter Marine subheading.  
* Deathworld Veteran’s Weathered ability grants IMPERVIOUS instead of \-1 INJURY DICE, and gains NEGATE FIRE and NEGATE STUN.  
* Penal Legionnaire’s Hand Flamer updated to latest rules  
* Hospitaler has an extra \+1 DICE to healing action, and heals 3 BLOOD MARKERS on a crit instead of D3.  
* Sister of Silence Executioner Greatblade gains CRITICAL.  
* Combat Servitor, Gun Servitor, and Medicae Servitor gain Painless and Property abilities.  
* Locus tail moves even Down targets.  
* Sump Beast prehensile Tongue moves even Down targets.  
* Ambot’s Mono-Hoo moves even Down targets.  
* Barghesi Raider’s Harpoon Launcher updated to latest stats.  
* Daemon Prince’s Hellforged Weapon is AP 2 or SWEEPING  
* Hell-Forged Heretek’s Mechadendrites have NEGATE OFF-HAND instead of a special note that it does not suffer off-hand penalties.  
* Corsair Shade Runner costs 4 Glory instead of 3 and has AELDARI Keyword.  
* Corsair Soul Weaver has a Witchblade instead of a Power Blade has AELDARI Keyword.  
* Pathfinder has AELDARI and STEALTH Keywords, and Hunter Unseen applies when STEALTH does.  
* Arkanyst Evaluator can choose to grant 30 credits instead of changing resources, and uses DANGEROUS for Full Charge and DANGEROUS (+1 INJURY DICE) for Overcharge.  
* CORVs cost 3 Glory instead of 2\.  
* Squat Exo-Driller costs 4 Glory instead of 5  
* Cold-Blood Hover Platform has TOUGH  
* Sunblood has TOUGH and Alpha Predator instead of Predator  
* Parasite of Mortrex costs 4 Glory instead of 5, and has TOUGH  
* Von Ryan’s Leaper costs 3 Glory instead of 4  
* Locus’s Barbed Tail has WHIP 6” instead of 3”  
* Sanctus Talon’s Assassinate affects enemies that have not yet activated instead of always on a Charge  
* Canoptek Reanimator’s claws have CLEAVE 2, not just CLEAVE (which means nothing)  
* Deep Hive Hunter removed, Deep Hunter option added to Hired Gun.  
* Grapplehawk has ARTIFICIAL and can drag models instead of attaching to enemies.  
* Borewyrm Swarm removed  
* Millisaur has 7“ movement, Evasive ability  
* Giant Grapplehawk renamed to Macro-Grapplehawk and has ARTIFICIAL, drags even LARGE models instead of preventing Retreat/standing, has LIMITED POTENTIAL instead of NO PROMOTION  
* Ripperjack prevents standing from Down  
* Freebooter weapon has \-1 DICE instead of RISKY  
* Genestealer’s Vanguard Predator updated to correct version  
* Saint Celestine’s healing is D3 normally, or 3 on a crit

Aeldari

* Haywire Grenades cost 17  
* Melta Bombs cost 20  
* Plasma Grenades cost 20  
* Triskeles cost 10  
* Power Blades cost 17 instead of 15  
* Dragon Fusion Pistol loses RISKY  
* Aegis Of Eldanesh’s is it own \-1 IMPERVIOUS armour  
* Avenging Blade has MAIN HAND ONLY  
* Banner of Asuryan has ICON

* Blast Pistol loses ASSAULT and is Elite/Wych Only  
* Splinter Pistol and Stinger Pistol have MAIN HAND ONLY  
* Spirit Syphon costs 30 instead of 40  
* Twin Haywire Blaster loses IGNORE ARMOUR, but has IGNORE COVER and \+1 INJURY DICE against artificial/vehicle, instead of \-1 against other things  
* Hellglaives cost 20 instead of 25  
* Scourge Wings cost 25 instead of 30  
* Wracks’ bonus attack cannot use a PISTOL  
* Animus VItae has THROWN as intended  
* Casket of Suffering costs 3 Glory  
* Helm of Spite Denies the Witch as PSYKER 2  
* Parasite’s Kiss costs 4 Glory  
* Soulshard Grenade has \-1 INJUR DICE base, bonus applies to DAEMONS also, costs 3 Glory  
* Tormentrix costs 4 Glory  
* Triptych Whip has MAIN HAND ONLY

Genestealer Cult

* Malstrain Alpha’s Vanguard Predator updated to correct version, and doesn’t have LEADER by default  
* Metamorph Upgrade weapon effect replaced, upgrade costs 10 and number available is rounded up instead of down  
* Aberrants can use Heavy Power Weapon, Thunder Hammer, or Two-Handed Hammer, cost 45  
* Added Hypermorph to Aberrants  
* Abominants gain Familiar weapon, can use Heavy Power Weapon or Thunder Hammer, cost 100 credits  
* Heavy Mining weapons are non-Aberrant only  
* Thunder Hammer can be used by Aberrants  
* Abominant has FEAR instead of NEGATE FEAR  
* Amulet Of The Voidwyrm applies after BLOOD MARKERS, costs 7 Glory  
* Crouchling costs 5 Glory  
* Gift From Beyond costs 4 Glory  
* Pennant of Ascension costs 5 Glory  
* Stratodais costs 1 Glory

Harlequins

* Hallucinogen Grenades have IGNORE COVER and IGNORE LONG RANGE, as they should.  
* Haywire Grenades cost 17  
* Plasma Grenades cost 20  
* Prismatic Grenades cost 12  
* Star Bolas cost 25  
* Wireweave Grenades cost 15  
* Crescendo has PISTOL  
* Cegorach’s Rose has MAIN HAND ONLY and costs 4 Glory  
* Laughing God’s Eye costs 3 Glory  
* Mask Of Secrets also allows PSYKER X and costs 5 Glory  
* Serpent’s Tail has MAIN HAND ONLY  
* Storied Sword grants parry effect and costs 5 Glory

Heretic Astartes

* Added Vox unit to armory.  
* Alpha Legion’s Many Heads of the Serpent applies only to the Warband leader initially, then can continue to be moved to other models. Cannot choose a FOLLOWER instead of specifying Cultists and Vehicles.  
* Night Lords’ Comm Jammer applies to more types of effects.  
* Word Bearers’ leader doesn’t count towards the normal limit for that type of model.  
* Added Eviscerator to armoury, World Eaters can buy 2 instead of having a special Heavy Chain Weapon  
* Dar Apostle and Chaos Sorcerer lose LARGE  
* Sekhetar Robot gains LARGE  
* Infernal Gateway has 12” range and loses \+1 INJURY DICE  
* Icons have the ICON Keyword. Icon of Vengeance loses LEADER Keyword. Icons have a limit of 1 total.  
* Cult Icon costs 15 credits for Thousand Sons  
* Icon of Despair costs 10 credits and instead of giving FEAR, gives \-1 DICE to enemy actions if they don’t ignore FEAR  
* Icon of Excess costs 10 credits and prevents falling when Downed and ignores Difficult/Dangerous Terrain  
* Icon of Flame costs 10 credits and grants IGNORE COVER instead of ARMOUR PIERCING 1  
* Icon of Wrath costs 10 credits and grants extra movement before a Charge instead of \+1 INJURY MODIFIER after a Charge  
* Black Rune Of Damnation affects Cultists within 12”  
* Blade Of The Relentless costs 4 Glory  
* Foecleaver costs 4 Glory  
* Gorget Of Eternal Hate is not lost via casualties  
* Orb of Curze costs 2 Glory  
* Orbs Of Unlife costs 5 Glory, gains ASSAULT, THROWN, and FUMBLE  
* Shadesword costs 4 Glory  
* Soulsnare Sigil costs 2 Glory  
* Talisman Of Burning Blood moves 6”, can Retreat  
* Warpbreacher is Risky  
* Billowing Censer has range of 6” to ally and enemy, costs 2 Glory  
* Orb of Decay costs 7 Glory  
* Plague Skull has \-1 INJURY DICE, costs 6 Glory  
* Putrid Periapt costs 2 Glory  
* Reaper of Glorious Entropy loses INFECTION MARKERS, costs 6 Glory  
* Revolting Stench-Vats also doesn’t affect PSYKER X, costs 5 Glory  
* Umbralefic Crystal costs 9 Glory  
* Stave Abominus has TWO-HANDED and CUMBERSOME  
* Warpweave Mantle effect replaced with removing charge dice  
* Bloodstep Blade has MAIN HAND ONLY instead of HEAVY  
* Gorefather costs 5 Glory  
* Witchskull Totem effect replaced, costs 3 Glory  
* Mighty Skullrack costs 2 Glory  
* Removed Brazen Rune from World Eaters Glory Shop  
* Added Infernal Infusion to World Eaters Glory Shop

Inquisition

* Instead of simply earning 4 Glory each Reinforce, Requisition allows purchasing until you have up to an amount of Glory equal to 11 plus 2 times the number of games played.  
* Relic Digital Weapon replaced with Relic Digital Lasers.  
* Replaced Troop Flag with Imperial Icon  
* Heavy Power Weapon costs 25

Leagues of Votann

* Throwing Plasma Knives cost 10  
* Concussion weapons move even Down targets.  
* Removed Troop Flag  
* Captive Abyss has THROWN and costs 2 Glory  
* Exactor costs 3 Glory  
* Forgestar has \-1 INJURY DICE  
* Kâhyrm’s War Plate costs 9 Glory

Necromunda Gang

* Stub Cannon and Concussion Carbine move even Down targets.  
* Shackleman's Harpoon Launcher updated to latest stats  
* Stub Cannon loses \-1 INJURY DICE, costs 15 instead of 20  
* Replaced Troop Flag with Cult Icon

Necrons

* Added Transdimensional Isolator and Twin Gauss Reaper weapons.  
* Twin Gauss Blaster and Twin Tesla Carbine usable by non-Tomb Blades, but have LIMIT: 2\.  
* Gauss Flayer costs 17 credits  
* Gauss Reaper costs 20 credits  
* Gauss Blaster costs 50 credits  
* Twin Gauss Blaster costs 60 credits  
* Particle Beamer costs 12 credits  
* Transdimensional Beamer costs 15 credits  
* Made Heirotek Circle its own variant, without Canoptek options, but with Cryptothralls  
* Updated Canoptek Court to focus on robots, and removed Heirotek Circle stuff.  
* Apprentek can be reassigned if their Cryptek dies.

* Conduit Of Stars costs 6 Glory  
* Resurrection Orb has 18” range, costs 7 Glory

Officio Assassinorum

* Poison Globes cost 25  
* Death Card costs 1 Glory  
* Esoteric Explosives costs 6 Glory  
* Hyperstimms costs 2 Glory  
* Micromelta Rounds costs 5 Glory  
* Psyber-Eagle has ASSAULT and costs 3 Glory  
* Heavy Power Weapon costs 25

Orks

* Warboss has \+0 Ranged instead of \+1, costs 5 less  
* Bosspole is Elite-Only, grants Musical Instrument effect instead of LEADER, costs 20 credits instead of 1 Glory.  
* Added Waaagh\! Banner, which functions as a Troop Flag.  
* Runtherd’s attack bonus only applies to non-PISTOL melee weapons.  
* Firey Stikkbombs cost 5 instead of 10 and fumble on a 2, 3, or 4  
* Krak Stikkboms fumble on a 2, 3, or 4  
* Stibombs cost 7 instead of 5 and fumble on a 2, 3, or 4  
* Traktor Blasta moves even Down targets.  
* Power Klaw has \+1 INJURY DICE instead of \+2  
* Waaagh\! Banner replaces LEADER with ICON, has NEGATE FEAR aura, and costs 15 credits  
* Da Killa Klaw has \+2 INJURY DICE instead of DEADLY, costs 5 Glory  
* Da Krushin’ Armour counts a Mega Armour, costs 7 Glory  
* Da Souped Up Shokka has TWO-HANDED and DANGEOUS, no injury on miss, costs 5 Glory  
* Headwoppa’s Killchoppa \+2 INJURY DICE instead of DEADLY, costs 5 Glory  
* Supa-Cybork Body costs 6 Glory  
* Gitstoppa Rounds uses AMMUNITION wording

Pirate Crew

* Grenadier has \-1 DICE at its bonus range.

Slann

* Gravity Bombs cost 25  
* Net Bombs have THROWN, as they should, have \+1 INJURY DICE instead of \+2, and cost 15  
* Hypertoxin Grenades cost 25  
* Plasma Grenades cost 20  
* Troop Icon replaces LEADER with ICON, has NEGATE FEAR aura, and costs 15 credits  
* Blade of Realities has MAIN HAND ONLY and costs 4 Glory  
* Cloak of Feathers costs 4 Glory  
* Prism of Amyntok costs 1 Glory  
* Spacefolder’s Stave has melee weapon stats

Vermintide

* Plasma Bombs cost 15  
* Poison Stars cost 10  
* Globodiers has \-1 DICE to hit beyond normal range.

T’au

* EMP Grenades cost 17  
* Tri-Blades cost 7  
* Comms Unit’s effect replaced with the old Musical Instrument effect, costs 15\.  
* Recon Drone gets LARGE  
* Advanced EM Scrambler costs 3 Glory  
* Ka’chak’tarr costs 5 Glory  
* Kindled Blade costs 4 Glory  
* Krep’chak has MAIN HAND ONLY, costs 4 Glory

Tyranids

* Electroshock Grubs cost 10  
* Desiccator Larvae cost 15  
* Shreddershard Beetles cost 15  
* Toxic Glands cost 12

### Beta 1.3.3: 4/21/2026

Updated wording to Trench Crusade version 1.0.2.

* BURROW is now a Keyword instead of a movement type.  
* Added FLYING Keyword to flying models.  
* Replaced MULTISTRIKE with CLEAVE, now that it exists (they do the same thing).  
* Updated 3d6 Injury weapons to DEADLY Keyword.  
* Updated mine-setters to use MINED Keyword and gave them NEGATE MINED.  
* Updated regenerating models to REGENERATE Keyword.  
* Updated ammunition equipment to AMMUNITION Keyword.  
* Updated Pistoleer style abilities to new wording from the skill.  
* Updated Skill & Expertise Skill, but cannot choose Dash, and can choose battlekit actions.  
* Resist and Bite Glorious Deed updated.  
* Glorious Deeds that no model is involved in give XP to the Warband Leader (or any Elite with LEADER, technically).  
* Patron skills that increase the limit for models or battlekit no longer continue applying if the model with the skill is removed from your Warband.

General

* Added SWEEPING Keyword to simplify weapons that hit every enemy in melee.  
* Various wording and typo fixes and clarifications.  
* Stunlock causes the model to fall/stay Down.  
* Updated how placement and acquisition of markers for various campaign rules works (archeotech, ingredients, etc.). All are now recovered immediately rather than carried, and have more specific placement rules.  
* Added Reinforce rule to make it more permissive.  
* Two-handed weapons used in one hand via STRONG have MAIN HAND ONLY.

Battlekit

* Added Smoke Grenades.  
* Stakethrower cost reduced cost to 10 from 15 in all factions that have it.  
* Replaced old GRENADE Keyword with IGNORE COVER and IGNORE LONG RANGE.  
* Krak Grenades cost 10 instead of 15\.  
* Melta Bombs have \+1 INJURY DICE, but range is 6” instead of 8”.  
* Psyk-Out Grenades moved to Shared Battlekit. Removed PSYCHIC Keyword.  
* Las Cannons have 48” range and ARMOUR PIERCING 2 instead of \+1 INJURY DICE. Updated to correct cost of 35 for Astartes and Heretic Astartes.  
* Chain Glaive loses Shield Combo, but has VICIOUS 11  
* Specified that a model can only equip one shield.  
* Lightning Claw, Chain Fist, and Heavy Power Fist have HELD, and cost 12, 30, and 25 respectively.  
* Storm Bolters no longer allow one-handing with STRONG by default.  
* Terminator Armour allows STRONG to be used to one-hand a ranged weapon.

Psychic Powers

* Models with PSYKER Keyword cost reduced all around.  
* Most PSYKER models can take powers from only one Discipline and no longer choose an additional Shared one.  
* Many psychic powers updated in a variety of ways for better balance.

Shared Patrons

* Fixed missing Lord Inquisitor skill, moved some skill effects around.  
* Ecclesiastic Inspiration skill from Ecclesiastic Cardinal grants 1 Miracle instead of 1D3.

Missions

* Toxic Crossing wording updated.  
* Industrial Zone lasts five turns, and industrial accidents only happen is a machine is powered.

Mercenaries

* Fixed pistols missing PISTOL.  
* Added Plague Zombie.  
* Added Summoned Flesh Hound, Nurgling Swarm, Seeker, and Screamer.  
* Added Accursed Cultist and Heretic Weapon Team.  
* Hospitaller’s Medicus Ministorum, when you have Battle Hymns or Vows of Atonement, gets extra bonus within 6” (or 9” of a Dialogus) instead of 3”.  
* Ministorum Priest’s The Emperor Protects updated to match Adeptus Ministorum Battle Hymn. Gains Standard Armour. Costs 4 Glory instead of 3\.  
* Ministorum Vindictor gets ASSAULT with its ranged attack and gains The Emperor’s Strength ability. Gains Standard Armour. Costs 4 Glory instead of 3\.  
* Questkeeper has \+1 Ranged and \+2 Melee, NEGATE FEAR, and costs 3 Glory instead of 4\.  
* Saint Celetine costs 2 Glory to deploy.  
* Salvationist has \+1 DICE with its Medicae Kit and Standard Armor.  
* Flayed Ones cost 2 Glory instead of 3\.  
* Genestealers cost 2 Glory instead of 3\.  
* Ambull has CLEAVE 2 instead of two weapons.  
* Venus Infocyte mercenary uses Ambidexterous ability text.  
* Sister of Silence gets Psyk-Out Grenades.  
* Blessed Blades cost 4 Glory instead of 5\.  
* Corsair Mercenaries have \+2/+2 skill instead of \+1/+1.  
* Canoptek Reanimator’s claws get CLEAVE 2  
* Canoptek Wraith coils have TWO-HANDED.  
* Grot Gunslinger’s Ded Killy applies only to ranged attacks.  
* Ordo Minorris Inquisitor has a Heavy Power Weapon instead of a Heavy Power Fist.

Adepta Sororitas

* Added Mortisanctus upgrade for battle sisters.  
* Heavy Power Weapon no longer has LIMIT, but is Mortisanctus or Paragon Warsuit only.  
* Hand Flamers fixed so they can be used by Battle Sisters.  
* Repentia can take Purity Seals. (Why not?)  
* Saint’s Pulpit costs 5 Glory instead of 4\.  
* Litanies of Faith applies only to Success Rolls.  
* Armourium Cherub applies to a full Activation instead of one attack.

Adeptus Astartes

* Basic Astartes model renamed to Space Marine to avoid confusion with Keyword.  
* Fenrisian Wolves have the ASTARTES Keyword.  
* Dreadnought can use one-handed HEAVY weapons.  
* Added Inceptor and Suppressor space marine upgrades.  
* Can take 2 Plasma Pistols, and Inceptors can have them.

Adeptus Custodes

* Added Psyk-Out Grenades to Armoury.  
* Interceptor Lance gets Shield Combo, but no base \+1 INJURY DICE. Added to Armoury list for 15 credits.

Adeptus Mechanicus

* Redundant “except for Claw weapons” text removed.  
* Firepoint Telemetry Cache simplified to use COVER Keyword.  
* Clarified Sicarian Princeps gets ELITE and is the Warband leader.  
* Sulphur Breath simplified to have ASSAULT keyword and clarified that it takes no hands.  
* Skitarii Huscarls can take Power Armour.

Adeptus Ministorum

* The Emperor Protects Battle Hymn applies only to the first \-1 Armour.  
* Zealot’s Vindictor has ASSAULT and costs 45 instead of 40\.  
* Battle Cherubs can carry a Reliquarius.  
* Miraculous always counts as having a Bludgeon.  
* Dogmatas in the Ecclesiastic Militant Force get ORATOR and give BLESSING MARKERs instead of Miracles.  
* Ecclesiastic Militant Force Fervor ability applies within 6” (or 9” of a Dialogus) instead of 3”.

Aeldari

* Wraithseer fixed to have 60mm base, \-3 Armour, and \+10 cost.

Astra Militarum

* Death Corp Sappers cost \+15 instead of \+20.  
* Conscripts activate in Fireteams, and count as half a model for morale and model limit, but have \-1 Ranged Skill. You cannot take more of them than other models.  
* Moiraean Lance clarified to draw a line only when used to make a ranged attack.  
* Traitor Guard can choose Heretek Lord or one of the four gods as their patron.

Chaos Cult

* Added Helot Cult Warband Variant.  
* Cult Rabble can upgrade to Chaos Devotees and keep their special ability. They now have NO PROMOTION.  
* Blade of Chaos gives a Bludgeon if it is temporary and the model has no melee weapon.  
* Gun Morph gives a Las Pistol if it is temporary and the model has no ranged weapon.  
* Warp Claws reworded to allow choosing a held weapon or a claw in battle.  
* All Consuming Hatred does not stack.  
* Added Stub Pistol to armoury.  
* Added Psychic Familiar to armoury.  
* Burning Censor has TWO-HANDED.  
* Permanent Gifts of Chaos do not increase a model’s cost, and cost 5 for one-off games.

Drukhari

* Haemonculus Coven can take any number of Wracks.  
* Wych Cult can take any number of Wyches.  
* Tormentor Helm has IGNORE LONG RANGE.

Genestealer Cults

* Add Malstrain Variant.  
* Broodlord has N/A Ranged Skill and costs 10 less, as its only ranged attacks uses its PSYKER Keyword.  
* Broodcoven can recruit up to 5 Genestealers, but only up to 3 Acolytes.  
* Final Day can take Von Ryan’s Leapers mercenaries.

Heretic Astartes

* Basic Heretic Astartes model renamed to Chaos Space Marine to avoid confusion with Keyword.  
* Helbrute Hammer adds INJURY MODIFIER instead of INJURY DICE.  
* Power Scourge uses SWEEPING Keyword and has AP 1\.  
* World Eaters can upgrade marines to Berzerkers, allowing them to ignore HEAVY on one melee weapon. They can no longer upgrade Havocs.  
* Jakhals get \+1 melee skill (total \+0) and cost 5 more. Goremongers further gain SKIRMISHER.  
* Blood Harpoon is Jakhal Only, LIMIT 1, and is a melee weapon with WHIP 18”.  
* Added Twin Chain Blades to World Eaters armoury. Removed extra Chain Glaives.  
* World Eaters can take two Chain Fists.  
* Tallyband, Carnival of Excess, Changehost, and Daemonkin cannot recruit “Summoned” mercenaries.

Inquisition

* Has the full extra 11 Glory for one-off games instead of just 7\.

Necromunda Gang

* Added Alliances to Campaign Shop and all of their associated mercenaries.  
* Added Delegation Gang.  
* Added Scavvies Gang.  
* Added Slave Ogryn Gang.  
* Added Scummers Gang.  
* Added Ratskins Gang.  
* Added Stim-Slug Cache equipment.  
* Added Camo Cloak and Grav Chute to Armoury.  
* Blessed By The Lord Of Skin & Sinew no longer has base \-1 DICE.  
* Corpsegrinder Cult have restricted access to Chaos mercenaries, but get Hive and Hive Beast mercenaries.  
* Ironhead Squat Prospectors get IMPERVIOUS for \-1 of their armour instead of extra armour, but cost 10 less. Exo-Drillers get IMPERVIOUS for \-1 of their armour.  
* Ironhead Squat Prospector Juves have \+0 skills, and cost 10 more (net 0 with IMPERVIOUS).  
* Ironhead Squat Prospector GANGERS count as VOTANN.  
* Techmite Ferramite Plating upgrade also gives IMPERVIOUS to \-1 of its armour.  
* House Orlock has no limit on Boltguns.  
* Digi Lasers replaced with updated Digital Lasers.  
* Added Asbestos Mandilion to House Cawdor.  
* House Escher Champions get \+1 DICE instead of \+1 INJURY DICE from their extra abilities.  
* Sump Lord skill Tunnel Rat renamed to Tunnel Runner.  
* Paired Blades cost 12 like other factions.  
* Hared armoury Halberd costs 7 instead of 10\.  
* Added additional equipment to Ash Waste Nomads, but they cannot take normal chems.  
* Blast Carbine and Blast Rifle cost 12 and 10 respectively, but replace \-1 INJURY DICE and FIRE with CRITICAL.  
* Added Ashwing Helamites to Ash Waste Nomads, but they can take only 1 Duneskuttler.  
* Added Haunt upgrade for Palanite Enforcers Juves.  
* Palanite Enforcers get Dum-Dum Ammunition and Power Weapons.  
* House Goliath gets Dum-Dum Rounds.

Leagues of Votann

* All models besides Beserks get IMPERVIOUS for \-1 of their armour and cost 5 more.

Necrons

* Reanimation Protocols has \+1 DICE, but can succeed only once per Turn.  
* Gauss Blaster is HEAVY and AUTOMATIC 2, but not ASSAULT, and costs 35\. Twin version updated to match, costs 40, and is Tomb Blade Only.  
* Gauss Cannon costs 40 instead of 30 and is LIMIT: 1\.  
* Tesla Carbine is ASSAULT, HEAVY, STUN, and VICIOUS 11 instead of FIRE, it can bounce once, and costs 25\. Twin version updated to match, costs 30, and is Tomb Blade Only.  
* Tesla Cannon increases range to 36”, costs 25 instead of 20\.  
* Heat Ray has LIMIT: 1\.  
* Necron Lord gets Relentless March, but has \-2 Armour instead of \-3.  
* Royal Warden’s Engrammatic Logic requires no roll and has lots more options, it gets Relentless March, but it costs 100 instead of 85\.  
* Necron Warriors have \-1 Armour instead of \-2, but cost 45 instead of 70\.  
* Immortals get Heavy Gunner, but have \-2 Armour instead of \-3. They cost 5 less.  
* Deathmarks and Lychguard cost 5 less to upgrade, but lose the Heavy Gunner ability.  
* Lokhust Lord and Skorpekh Lord have \+3/+3 skill each, but cost 15 more.

Officio Assassinorum

* Digital Laser campaign item replaced with Digital Laser Array, and Digital Laser added to armoury.  
* Infocyte’s Ambidexterous updated to newer Pistoleer text.

Orks

* Adjusted the statistics and costs of most ranged weapons (and warbike which includes one), removing RISKY from most non-Mek specific guns and giving them \-1 DICE instead, and largely reduced costs.

Pirate Crew

* Kin get IMPERVIOUS for \-1 of their armour instead of extra armour, but cost less.  
* Black Market Acquisitions counts credits for one-off games instead of a flat 3\.

T’au Empire

* Ethereal’s Wisdom of the Guides invocation effect replaced. Sense of Stone and Zephyr’s Grace buffed.  
* Demiurge Auxiliaries get IMPERVIOUS for \-1 of their armour instead of extra armour, but cost less.

Tyranids

* Feed the Swarm ability for Assimilation Swarm simplified and works like a Medicae Kit.  
* Zoanthrope has N/A Ranged Skill and costs 5 less.  
* Neurotyrant has N/A Ranged Skill and costs 10 less.

### Beta 1.3.2: 2/13/2026

Formatting

* Added list of available Mercenaries to each faction.  
* Various wording fixes and clarifications.

Campaign

* Added Psychic Awakening skill to Wildcare chart, and removed War Luck skill.

Battlekit

* Psyker Staff renamed to Force Rod.  
* Two-handed Force Staff weapon with a Smite ranged attack added.  
* Force Weapons and similar reworked to be \+1 INJURY DICE instead of ARMOUR PIECING 2 like Power Weapons, price increased slightly. LIMIT: 2 added to basic Force Weapons. LIMITS added to similar weapons.

Psychic Powers

* Smite power renamed to Bio Lightning so weapons can use Smite as the name of ranged attacks.

Adepta Sororitas

* Dialogus mercenary gets STUN in melee, weapon renamed.  
* Added Virge of Admonition weapon.  
* Trial of Purity also succeeds if your opponent fails morale.

Adeptus Astartes

* Dreadnaught cost increased to 170\.

Adeptus Custodes

* Swapped TOUGH (and \-1D Injury for elites) for a GOLEM-like ability, except Shield-Captain gets both. Shield-Captain has \+20 cost.  
* Custodian Wardens’ Living Fortress ability gives \-1 of their armour IMPERVIOUS instead of regeneration, but costs 10 less.  
* Strategic Mastery no longer requires a roll.  
* Praesidium Shield costs 20 instead of 25\.

Aeldari

* Increased skill bonuses for Elites, Guardians, and Aspect Warriors.  
* Increased costs appropriately.

Aeldari and Harlequins

* Witchblade and Witch Staff conform to normal \+1 INJURY DICE against PSYKER/DAEMON targets. Witchblade conforms to the new standard Force Weapon. Reduced cost for both.

Drukhari

* Various skill increases all around.  
* Various new Pain abilities.  
* Prices adjusted appropriately.  
* Armour renamed and limited to more specific models, and added Wychsuits.  
* Grotesque moved to Haemonculous Coven Only.  
* Cronos and Talos moved to normal units.  
* Heat Lance has FIRE (as it should have).

Genestealer Cults

* Religion institution also succeeds if your opponent fails morale.

Heretic Astartes

* Added Curseclaw, Depredator, and Warp Talons features to Night Lords, and they can choose to be Outlaw instead of Chaos.  
* Helbrute cost increased to 165\.  
* Rubric Marines get NEGATE GAS, but range to get Dash bonus is 6” instead of 9”.

Necrons

* Heat Ray costs 40 instead of 60 due to not ignoring armour.  
* Added Hyperphase Thresher weapon to Destroyer Cult.  
* Only one model can reanimate normally per Turn, but the toll has \+1 DICE.  
* Plasmacyte Reanimator costs 10 instead of 15 and can alternatively be used to ignore the 1/Turn limit on reanimation.  
* Nanoscarab Casket lets the model not roll of the trauma table instead of being a duplicate of Phylactery.

Orks

* Da Jump has a randomized effect, reduced range to 6” from 18”.  
* Deff Dread can take 1 Assistant, including Grot Oiler.  
* ‘Eavy Armour loses HEAVY, but causes non-STRONG models to roll D3 for charges. Costs 10 instead of 12\.  
* Da Biggest and da Best gives only 1 extra attack instead of 2\.  
* Stormboys must be equipped with a Jump Rokkit in order to be deployed.

T’au Empire

* Convict planet also succeeds if your opponent fails morale.  
* Added Kroot Bayonet, and Bayonet Lug to some of their weapons.  
* Javelins get ASSAULT, Hunting Javelins cost 15 instead of 10\.  
* Dart Bow can use Melee Skill.

Tyranids

* Blinding Venom costs 5 credits instead of 10 credits.  
* Electroshock Grubs cost 7 credits instead of 10\.  
* Desiccator Larvae cost 10 credits instead of 7\.

Votann 

* Volkanite Disintegrator exchanges ASSAULT for ARMOUR PIERCING 2, \+5 cost.  
* HEAVY Volkanite Disintegrator exchanges \+1 INJURY DICE for IGNORE ARMOUR.  
* Magna Rail Rifle cost increased to 45 credits from 35\.  
* Added Grav Pistols to armoury.  
* Beserks get full STRONG.

### Beta 1.3.1

General

* Reduced the cost of some melee-only models.  
* Bladed Stance and similar abilities (except the Succubus, who has to pay to use it) can only be used by a model that has not acted yet, and costs its attack, but is a full Fight Action.

Psychic Powers

* Psychic Powers have been reformatted, PSYKER now has an X value assigned that determines the \+DICE used for using powers, replacing abilities that allow additional powers before suffering penalties, and is used for attack powers instead of ranged/melee skill.  
* Added PERILOUS Keyword that modifies the numbers needed to suffer Perils of the Warp.  
* Use of multiple powers causes PERILOUS in addition to \-DICE.  
* Models with PSYKER 2 or 3 have increased cost.  
* Deny the Witch slightly simplified.

Battlekit

* Hand flamers lose FLAMETHROWER in melee.  
* Removed minimums from ARMOUR PIERCING.  
* Lightning Claws cost 12 instead of 15\.  
* Added MAIN HAND ONLY Keyword. Some weapons were tweaked to accommodate.  
* Heavy Shield grants cover instead of \-1D Injury, as with Heavy Ballistic Shield in core game. Praesidium Shield loses \-1D to be Injured, but adds IMPERVIOUS to \-1 of armour.  
* Thunder Hammer has \+2 INJURY MODIFIER instead of \+1 and AP 1\.  
* Renamed Power Fist to Heavy Power Fist, to be less confusing. Normal Power Fist is just a Power Weapon like any other.

Mercenaries

* Barhesi Raider is now an Outlaw mercenary, but Drukhari can still take it.  
* Added Barghesi Thrall Outlaw, also available to Drukhari.  
* Removed ELITE from Dialogus, to prevent it from becoming a must-take for Sororitas who benefit more from elites now.

Heretic Astartes

* Chaos Lord not STRONG by default, costs 10 less.  
* Mark of Nurgle is ignored by Bloodbaths. Mark of Slaanesh gives \+2” movement instead of \+1”.  
* God-specific Marks of Chaos cost 15 credits instead of 2 Glory.  
* Death Guard’s Inevitable rule moved to Mark of Nurgle. Contagion ability is now extra, so they cost 5 more.  
* Great Plague Blade gets power weapon armour piercing, costs \+10.  
* Limit 1 Thunder Hammer.  
* Thousand Sons can recruit 2 Chaos Sorcerers instead of 3\. (This was intended originally, but Exalted Sorcerer became its one model instead of an upgrade.)  
* Bestial Prophet does not apply to self.

Sororitas and Ministorum

* Tweaks to Miracles rule and Sororitas elite abilities.  
* Null Rod and Null Skull updated to add FEAR and Deny the Witch instead of an aura of no psychic powers.  
* Repentia pay less for new Power Armour when promoted, but Battle Sisters’ armour becomes “reserved” while they are demoted.

Astartes

* Iron Halo costs 4 Glory instead of 2\.  
* Dreadnought equipment options clarified and simplified.  
* Limit 1 Thunder Hammer.  
* Great Frost Axe gets \+2 INJURY DICE instead of \+1, but loses AP1.

Custodes

* Custodes get STRONG, cost 5 more, but their main weapons get HEAVY and cost 5 less. Mostly this lets them use normal two-handed weapons in one hand.  
* Custodes’ combined weapons modified to be closer to Power Weapons, prices re-evaluated.  
* Custodes get Frag and Krak Grenades.  
* Contemptor Dreadnoughts equipment options clarified and simplified.

Gene Stealer Cults

* Abominant hits all enemies in melee.

Necrons

* Destroyer Cult unique weapons tweaked and re-costed.  
* Flayed Ones cost 70 instead of 75 or 80 for Court of the Flayer King and Destroyer Cult.  
* Plasmacytes are now once per battle, but take no action or roll, and Accelerators give \+2 DICE to the action. Accelerators cost 10 instead of 15\.  
* Resurrection Orb doesn’t require a roll.

Tyranids

* Shadow in the Warp causes increased DICE penalty to using multiple powers, since PERILOUS does not matter.  
* Neuroloids’ location can be used as the Neurotyrant’s for psychic powers, but cost 45\.

Pirate Crew

* Restricted Ork Campaign Shop items to ORK pirates.  
* More specialization options.

### Beta 1.3: 12/27/2025

* Wording fixes, typo fixes, keyword rearranging  
* Reduced cost to models of melee/ranged skill across the board.  
* Some minor balance tweaks and equipment updates to mercenaries.  
* Reduced costs of some basic pistols across the board to match the cost of 6 for pistols in full TC rules release. Ion Pistols become Elite Only and LIMIT 2 and cost 25 instead of 15\.  
* Ion Rifle for T’au is now an infantry weapon. T’au Ion weapons get \+1 INJURY DIE always, and BLAST 2” on overcharge, but now hurt the wielder on a missed overcharge like Imperial plasma weapons.  
* Added Ion Beamer to Votann.  
* Added Ecclesiastic Militant Force warband variant for Adeptus Ministorum.  
* Arco-Flails ignore off-hand penalties and have ARMOUR PIERCING 1\. Arco-Flagellants cost 1 more Glory, but earn 1 Glory on perma-death and give a BLESSING MARKER on OoA.  
* Removed Expendable from Rat Swarm.  
* Price of Las Rifle made 7 for more factions, 5 still for a few. Phosphor Blaster reduced cost to 10\.  
* Escort Supplies mission updated to have 3 transports.  
* Parasite of Mortrex is ELITE now.  
* Adeptus Ministorum melee hymn buffed and simplified. Ranged hymn affects accuracy instead of injury.  
* Jump Pack loses INFILTRATOR, but cost is reduced to 20 from 25, or 15 for Pirates (due to replacing some Rigger benefits).  
* Ravenguard now add DEEP STRIKE to their models with Jump Packs instead of replacing INFILTRATOR and ignoring the D3” movement.  
* Raven Guard Corvus Marine costs 5 Glory instead of 6\.  
* Venatari Custodians cost \+5 instead of \+10.  
* Effects that allow INFILTRATOR and DEEP STRIKE within 3” also remove D3” move for DEEP STRIKE.  
* Swapped to using HELD Keyword for weapons that take up hands for both melee and ranged.  
* Aeldari Guardians’ Ranger upgrade increased cost from 10 for 15, but now half can be Rangers.  
* Farskitter Cloak is now a teleport instead of DEEP STRIKE.  
* Ratling Tankstopper gets a Combat Helmet and Photo Goggles.  
* Penal Legionnaire and Deathworld veteran Glory cost increased.  
* Added Centurion Warsuit to Astartes.  
* Updated Sororitas Miracles rule to use BLESSING MARKERS, and removed MIRACULOUS from some models.  
* Tweaks to various Sororitas glory items.  
* Vodmaster gets STRONG and costs 10 more.  
* Big Shoota gets RELOAD.  
* Updated Tyranids to use Many-Armed ability instead of “Double” weapons with HELD. Renamed some claws, removed Bludgeon-equivalent claw.  
* Tail weapon costs adjusted. Deathspitter costs less, Heavy Devourer costs more.  
* Bonded Exoskeleton gives IMPERVIOUS to \-1 Armour instead of extra \-1 Armour.  
* Spore Mines and Mucaloid Spores ignore armour and have full effect outside of 1”.  
* Tyranid Warriors Have \+1 Melee Skill instead of \+2.  
* Raveners get TOUGH, but limited to 2\.  
* Added Subterranean Assault variant.  
* Removed duplicate Norn Crown and increased cost of remaining one,  
* Scorpion Claw is a one-handed weapon.  
* Weapons Platform and Serpent’s Scale combined into Guardian Platform with two options, and they work differently.  
* Made Mandiblasters equipment and gave Striking Scorpions Shadow Strike.  
* Removed Windrider Host Warband Variant, but added Shining Spears to normal Aspect options.  
* Added Phoenix Lord Patron.  
* Lord Captain's Personal Flair clarified to be non-Patron skills, and no longer includes Exploration skill specifically (as they can get them from the Explorer skill chart).  
* Fleetmaster grants Circle Back and Seek instead of any one Exploration Skill, as Expert Training can grant any of them due to the Explorer chart.  
* Added Slanni to Pirate Crew Background options. Reduced cost for Duelist, Feral Worlder, and Voidborn.  
* Photo Goggles ignore STEALTH now.  
* Fellgor for Traitor Guard is now just Gor, and you always choose a type for it rather than upgrades. Reworked Slaangor.  
* Added Chaos Pirates variant for Pirate Crew.  
* Juves have \-1/-1 skill and cost 15\.  
* Zoanthrope becomes a troop instead of a mercenary?  
* Added Biophagus  
* Space Marines and Custodes always turn Down into Minor Hits. Terminator Armour loses this property and costs 5 less, except for alternate version for Inquisitors.  
* Wulfen Frost Claws cost 5 less, due to being Wulfen Only but not HEAVY, making them inefficient for the STRONG models.  
* Custodian Guards max 2 of each upgrade, but you can take 5 instead of 4 total.  
* Added 2 new Sororitas variants.  
* Added Plague Vermin variant for Vermintide.

### Beta 1.2

* More typo fixes  
* Added 9 Missions\!  
* Krumper Rivet Cannon and Mining Laser have \-1 DICE due to being improvised. Mining Laser cheaper, Rivet Cannon deadlier.  
* Ripper Gun gets SHOTGUN  
* Legion of the Damned modified; no healing in exchange for buffs  
* Ork pistol math tweaked. Reduced Jump Rokkit price. Runt equipment costs adjusted.  
* Terminator Armour for non-Terminators grants STRONG, but costs more. Terminator and Chaos Terminator costs adjusted to match.

### Beta 1.1

* Various typo fixes and replacing effects with the appropriate keyword  
* Replaced Trader campaign skill effect  
* Slight fix to DEEP STRIKE scoring wording. Added DEEP STRIKE (TUNNEL) variant.  
* Battlefield exploration tweaked  
* Added Chaos Ogryn, Goff Rokker, Grot Gunslinger, Grot Tekkie, and Arkanyst Evaluator mercenaries  
* Painboss is now an upgrade for Warboss instead of a separate mercenary  
* Added Vermintide Chaos Faction and associated Mercenaries  
* Tweaked Skill and Expertise skill (now a middle ground between old and new official versions)  
* Updated whip weapons with a new WHIP Keyword, which functions like a reverse PISTOL  
* Mechanicus get Bayonets, updated Autocaduceus to be usable by any leader and count as a melee weapon, added voltlock arquebuses to Skitarii variant, gave Mindscrambler Grenades STUN MARKERS instead of no injuries, and fixed Arc Lances to be STUN and not FIRE  
* Added Saint Celestine mercenary  
* Added CLEAVE keyword for multiple melee attacks  
* Added NONLETHAL Keyword to un-complicate some wording.  
* Pulse Blaster gets SMG-style two shots instead of AUTOMATIC 2 and costs less.  
* Neuro Disruptor price adjusted and removed from Aeldari, Neural weapons no longer PSYCHIC  
* Grav Pistol price increased from 12 to 20  
* Heavy Armour costs 35 instead of 30\.  
* Cult Icon gets \+1 DICE for its healing.  
* Added Condemnor Bolt Pistols.  
* Added Slanni Xenos Faction and associated Mercenaries.  
* Removed Capable option (get a campaign skill) from Hired Gun Mercenary’s options  
* Added ELITE, NO PROMOTION, and LIMITED POTENTIAL to appropriate Mercenaries now that they can be promoted to or already be Elite  
* Added Pathfinder Aeldari Mercenary  
* Added Legion of the Damned Warband Variant for Adeptus Astartes  
* Added Imperial Navy Warband Variant for Astra Militarum  
* Removed Blasting Charges from Astra Militarum Armoury

### Beta 1.0

* First official version.
